data.title: OKX gets EU payment license for stablecoin expansion, including OKX Pay and OKX Card, after securing Malta institution license.
data.description: OKX has obtained a license from Malta allowing it to operate as a payment institution. This license will enable the company to offer EU-compliant stablecoin services, such as OKX Pay and the OKX Card.
BNP Paribas Announces Successful €1.4 Billion Fundraising for Capza Private Debt 7

data.title: Tryg initiates share buyback program worth up to DKK 1.0 billion, following EU regulations, set to end by May 13, 2026.
data.description: Tryg A/S revealed on 22 January 2026 that their Board of Directors approved a share buyback initiative amounting to a maximum of DKK 1.0 billion. This program aligns with the EU Market Abuse Regulation, EU Regulation no. 596/2014, and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 (the “Safe Harbour Regulation”). The buyback period is set to conclude by 13 May 2026.

data.title: Nucleome Therapeutics names Dr. Michelle Morrow as CSO, with expertise in immunology, oncology. Reflects progress at Nucleome.
data.description: With extensive knowledge in immunology, oncology, and pharmacology, the newly appointed individual brings valuable experience in advancing innovative pipelines from discovery to clinical translation. This development highlights the increasing progress at Nucleome after selecting the initial preclinical development candidate for the lead position.

data.title: K2 Partnering Solutions appoints Srinivas Rao as CEO, a seasoned executive with 28+ years of experience, driving operational transformation.
data.description: In London today, K2 Partnering Solutions revealed the selection of Srinivas Rao as their new Chief Executive Officer. Possessing over 28 years of experience in various sectors such as digital, consulting, IT services, and business services, Srinivas has a significant background in enhancing value, facilitating scalable growth, and leading operational changes. His expertise lies in managing intricate, multi-market businesses, showcasing a strong track record in driving success within such environments.

data.title: Kaldalón hf. bought 550,000 shares in week 7 of 2026 for ISK 14,850,000 under a buyback program.
data.description: During the seventh week of 2026, Kaldalón hf. bought back 550,000 of its own shares for a total cost of ISK 14,850,000.

data.title: Ericsson, Leonardo, and Italian Navy test 5G Standalone at sea. Long-range data communication and on-board connectivity successful. Live trials in real conditions.
data.description: Successful trials were conducted in STOCKHOLM to demonstrate long-range 5G SA data communication at sea. On-board connectivity and naval vessel systems were tested, with live trials carried out over an extended period in various operational conditions. The tests showed promising results, signaling advancements in maritime communication technology. The demonstration showcased the capability for efficient data transmission over substantial distances, highlighting the potential for enhanced connectivity at sea.

data.title: Halfpricesoft.com provides guide and video for 1095-C data import with ez1095 to support employers meet ACA deadlines efficiently.
data.description: Providing essential guidance to employers, a newly released instructional video and accompanying support offer invaluable assistance in meeting Affordable Care Act (ACA) deadlines. Halfpricesoft.com, based in REDMOND, Wash., unveiled this initiative on Feb. 16, 2026. The video showcases how to seamlessly import 1095-C data from a spreadsheet, hence instilling confidence among employers striving to fulfill ACA requirements. This service aims to enhance customer satisfaction and streamline the compliance process.

data.title: X-Humanoid launches Embodied Tien Kung 3.0, a more open and practical humanoid robotics platform in Beijing.
data.description: The Embodied Tien Kung 3.0, the latest general-purpose robot platform developed by the Beijing Innovation Center of Humanoid Robotics (X-Humanoid), has been officially launched in Beijing on February 16, 2026. This new robot platform is aimed at providing improved openness and usability. Leveraging X-Humanoid's expertise, the Embodied Tien Kung 3.0 is designed to offer advanced capabilities in robotics technology.
